complaints.title: Broken AC in Library 2nd Floor
complaints.description: The air conditioning unit in the silent study zone has been blowing hot air since yesterday morning. It's making it impossible to study during the heatwave.

complaints.title: Faulty Projector in Lecture Hall C
complaints.description: The HDMI cable for the ceiling projector is completely severed, and the color is distorted on the VGA port.

complaints.title: No hot water in Dorm Block A
complaints.description: There hasn't been any hot water in the showers on the 3rd floor for three days.

complaints.title: Flickering lights in parking lot
complaints.description: Several street lights in the north parking structure are completely out or flickering, making it unsafe at night.

emergencies.description: Student injured their ankle severely during basketball game, requires immediate medical support.
Suspicious individual loitering around the bike racks with tools.

events.title: Annual Tech Symposium 2026
events.description: Join us for 2 days of robotics, coding challenges, and tech talks from industry leaders.

events.title: Inter-College Basketball Finals
events.description: Cheer for our team as they face off against the rival college in the grand finals!

lostFound.title: Lost AirPods Pro
lostFound.description: I lost my AirPods case with the right earbud inside near the Science Block cafe.

lostFound.title: Found Calculator
lostFound.description: Found a Casio scientific calculator in Lecture Hall B. Handed over to security desk.
